assumptions: The developer has a supported browser, a work email inbox, and curl or an equivalent HTTP client.
No Bird account, workspace, API key, or prior message exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a Bird account and workspace, then send a first sandbox email through the shared onboarding domain until delivered status.

first_success.outcome: A sandbox email sent from onboarding@messagebird.dev to delivered@messagebird.dev reports delivered status.
first_success.observable_signal: Polling the message by its em_ ID returns status delivered.

route_selection.surface: Bird dashboard signup plus Send your first email quickstart
route_selection.rule: Prefer the documented onboarding-domain email quickstart over production domain verification; leave unverified while live signup controls remain incompletely observed.

candidates.name: Work-email signup, API key with emails:write, onboarding-domain cURL send and poll
candidates.reason: This is the official fastest path to a delivered sandbox email, but the live signup form and SSO versus password controls were not fully observed.

candidates.name: Legacy MessageBird channel install with DNS verification
candidates.reason: Older docs require installing an Email channel and verifying DNS before send, which is longer than the shared onboarding-domain route.

required_path.action: Open Bird signup and submit the work-email account creation form.

required_fields.label: Terms and Privacy Policy agreement
required_fields.notes: Signup page may treat submission as agreement; exact control was not independently confirmed in this audit.

required_path.observable_result: Bird sends a verification email and shows the confirmation screen.

required_path.action: Enter the emailed verification code or follow the confirmation link.
required_path.observable_result: The developer is signed in to a ready workspace.

required_path.action: Create an API key under Developers with emails:write scope and copy the full token.
required_path.observable_result: A region-prefixed API key such as bk_us1_... is available once.

required_path.action: POST the documented onboarding-domain email payload to the regional Bird email API host.
required_path.observable_result: The API accepts the message and returns an em_ message ID.

required_path.action: GET the message by em_ ID until status is delivered.
required_path.observable_result: The message status is delivered for the sandbox recipient.

prerequisites.description: API keys belong to a workspace and require an owner, Admin, or Developer role to create.

unavoidable_waits.description: Bird must deliver the signup verification email before dashboard use.
Sandbox email status progresses asynchronously from accepted through delivered.

platform_outcomes.description: Bird provides an automatically available workspace after email verification.
The shared onboarding domain accepts sends without DNS setup.

excluded.item: Verifying a production sending domain and publishing DNS records
excluded.reason: The official first-email quickstart uses the shared onboarding domain before production domain setup.

excluded.item: Reading documentation and optional dashboard tour
excluded.reason: Reading and optional orientation are not counted developer actions.

sources.title: Bird signup
evidence_supported: Public signup entry; exact live controls incompletely observed

sources.title: API key management
evidence_supported: Developers API keys location in dashboard

uncertainties.question: What exact current signup controls appear on bird.com/dashboard/signup, including SSO defaults, password-toggle wording, and terms checkbox versus implied agreement?
uncertainties.impact: Account-step field counts and whether an extra password-route click is required remain unverified.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated screenshots of the live signup form for email/password and any Google or SSO alternatives.

uncertainties.question: Does Bird currently require a work-email domain and reject personal mailboxes before verification?
uncertainties.impact: A work-email gate would change prerequisites and may block some fresh-account audits.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official signup validation behavior or a fresh attempt with a personal versus work email address.
